Original.Name: Simplicity of Snow - Blended Roads Patch-59282-1-0-1638262673.7z

State.Author: Titansbane
State.Description: A Simplicity of Snow patch for Blended Roads to properly cover them with snow.
State.Name: Blended Roads - Simplicity of Snow Patch

State.Author: Symonson
State.Description: This Mod changes Dawnstar to make it fit the description as a port.
State.Name: Capital of the Pale

State.Author: Kinaga
State.Description: A lightweight overhaul of both the vanilla Skyrim carriage system and Dawnguard's ferry system. Realistic and bug-free.
State.Name: Carriage and Ferry Travel Overhaul (Formerly Complete Fast Travel Overhaul)

State.Author: kartoffel
State.Description: All Skyrim SE textures cleaned of compression artifacts, removed bad bicubic upscaling, and other random fixes. Improves performance too.
State.Name: Cleaned Skyrim SE Textures

State.Author: hexabit
State.Description: Adds footprints to the player, NPCs, and creatures.  With particle FX!  Currently for snow and ash.  Custom footprints hook for third-party mods w/ custom races.  Heavily optimized since v1.00.
State.Name: Footprints

State.Author: WhiteWolf424242
State.Description: Allows the player to show their appreciation to their followers , spouse and adopted kids by dialogue and a hug animation. Fully voiced dialogue.
State.Name: I'm Glad You're Here - a follower and spouse appreciation mod - SSE

State.Author: Hvergelmir
State.Description:
The most popular (and only?) beard retexture mod for Skyrim, Beards - from Hvergelmir's Aesthetic series is now available for Skyrim: Special Edition!

Beards also enables previously unavailable beard styles Bethesda left out of the game (for good reason?)
State.Name: Beards

State.Author: Grantyboy050
State.Description: An overhaul of the buildings and inhabitants of the College of Winterhold.
State.Name: Immersive College of Winterhold

State.Author: Smartbluecat
State.Description: Inigo is a fully voiced khajiit adventuring companion with over 7000 lines of unique dialogue - much of it about you. He'll level alongside you and avoid most traps. If you're sneaking he won't chatter and he'll whisper if you talk to him. He can run out of arrows. He's highly skilled in archery, one-handed, and sneak.
State.Name: INIGO

State.Author: skyfall515
State.Description: Fortified Whiterun seeks to bring realistic and logical defenses to our most beloved city.
State.Name: Fortified Whiterun

State.Author: Jkrojmal
State.Description: An enhanced Whiterun outskirts overhaul
State.Name: JK's Whiterun Outskirts

State.Author: Joseph Russell
State.Description: Lucien is a fully voiced Imperial follower with over 5000 lines of immersive, lore-friendly dialogue. Though he arrives in Skyrim as a cowardly scholar, he'll gradually gain strength and confidence by your side until he grows into a hero in his own right.
State.Name: Lucien - Immersive Fully Voiced Male Follower

State.Author: sharrken
State.Description: A high-definition restoration of Skyrim's orignal voices and music, drawing from the much higher quality PS4 audio as a source.
State.Name: Unofficial High Definition Audio Project

State.Author: Tate Taylor
State.Description: Replaces the boarded-up Riften city gate with a fully functional load door.
State.Name: Riften Gate Restored

State.Author: RogueUnicorn00
State.Description: Adds trees and plants to Dawnstar, Falkreath, Ivarstead, Markarth, Raven Rock, Riften, Riverwood, Rorikstead, Solitude, Whiterun, and More... fully modular
State.Name: City Trees

State.Author: Martimius
State.Description: An expansion of Serana's dialogue and NPC features to make her a more immersive follower. Serana Dialogue Add-On is highly acclaimed and also featured in Forbes magazine.
State.Name: Serana Dialogue Add-On

State.Author: SkyUI Team
State.Description: Elegant, PC-friendly interface mod with many advanced features.
State.Name: SkyUI

State.Author: sharrken
State.Description: A high-definition restoration of Skyrim's orignal voices and music, drawing from the much higher quality PS4 audio as a source.
State.Name: Unofficial High Definition Audio Project

State.Description: A new yet familiar take on the Alternate Start concept. Experience Helgens Destruction from a viewpoint different than the Prisoners!

State.Description: A lightweight overhaul of both the vanilla Skyrim carriage system and Dawnguard's ferry system. Realistic and bug-free.

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: Tired of the College of Winterhold not actually teaching you any magic? Tired of jumping into Saarthal after your very first lesson? This mod provides 7 new starter magic lessons/quests to make your College of Winterhold feel like an actual school of magic.

State.Author: Community Shaders Team
State.Description: Open-source SKSE core plugin for community-driven advanced graphics modifications for AE, SE and VR. Also fixes bugs.

State.Author: JaySerpa

State.Author: AlmightySE
State.Description: "I'm Talkin' Here" prevents followers from making idle chatter during player dialogue.

State.Description: Extends Skyrim SE Papyrus scripts (or SKSE/C++ plugins) with JSON based serializable data structures like arrays and maps. Embedded Lua interpreter.

State.Author: Netherworks
State.Description: Nether's Follower Framework is a multi-follower system that is light on game resources and allows for up to 10 companions at one time. It provides a wealth of additional features, including immersion and quality-of-life functions to allow you to adventure with a small team of characters.

State.Description: Your all in 1 skyrim behavior framework. Automated behavior modification extraction, behavior patching and more. Currently still in beta stage

State.Description: A large, community compilation of fixes for bugs, inconsistencies, and errors that can come to light from a modded Skyrim and its DLCs. State.Author: Shutt3r
State.Description: The aim of this mod is to give all of Skyrim's architecture a complete new look by changing its textures to custom ones. Beside the architecture, several other things, such as landscape, dungeons (ruins, mines, caves etc.), clutter stuff etc. have been re-textured as well, to match the rest of the mod.  Try it out !
State.Name: Noble Skyrim Mod HD-2K

State.Author: meh321
State.Description: Contains header file and a database to make SKSE DLL plugins version independent easily.

State.Author: Shrimperator

SKSE DLL to overhaul 3rd person object selection. 



Rewrites Skyrim's crosshair selection to work more like true 3rd person RPGs - no more spending 5 minutes picking up tiny gold coins from the ground!
State.Name: Better Third Person Selection - BTPS

State.Description: This mod replaces the morphs for the vanilla human and elf character creations and adds a morph for Racemenu.

State.Author: GiraPomba
State.Description: Context-aware animations when interacting with the world in FIRST PERSON. Animated greeting of NPCs, pickpocketing, lockpicking, and more!

State.Author: doodlum
State.Description: Community Shaders feature which replaces grass shaders. Includes a directional light fix, point lights, improved lighting and emulated complex grass.

State.Author: LucidAPs
State.Description: An on going process to improve the models of the game with more polygons , UV edits or just replace them all together. SMIM was the inspiration and the lack of similar mods led me to make this.

State.Author: Shazdeh2
State.Description: See all your hotkeys with the press of a button.
State.Name: Hotkey Reminder

Original.Name: Immersive Armors Retexture and Mesh Fixes SE-75891-1-6-1679607226.rar

State.Author: Xavbio
State.Description: This mod retextures and fixes most of Hothtrooper44's Immersive Armors. The sets contained are split into 3 categories: Retextures, Mesh replacers and Mesh fixes. CBBE and HIMBO patches linked in the comments
State.Name: Immersive Armors Retexture and Mesh Fixes SE

State.Author: Hothtrooper44 -  Ironman5000 - Eckss
State.Description: Immersive Weapons seeks to drastically enhance the variety of weapons in the world of Skyrim in a lore friendly way. The goal of every addition is to blend into the lore, balance and feel of the game for the most immersive experience possible.
State.Name: Immersive Weapons

State.Author: Kalilies and Stealthic
State.Description: KS Hairdos is a hair pack that contains 983 hairstyles. 876 hairstyles are for females, 107 are for males.
State.Name: KS Hairdos SSE

State.Author: Kozuke Hajime
State.Description: Adds wenches to every inn in skyrim to "serve and chat" with the patrons of an inn using custom scenes, also some quests, adds barmaids that work as servers/innkeepers and maid wenches with a bodyguard that travel around skyrim. They can be turned into followers (they have custom spells/perks/classes/AI) and can be spouses.
State.Name: Immersive Wenches

State.Author: shazdeh2
State.Description: Adds an interactive legend to the map menu, so you can toggle off undesired map markers.
State.Name: Legendary Map

State.Author: Jampion
State.Description: Adds 110 high quality and lore friendly artworks from "The Elder Scrolls: Legends" as loading screens. Works as a vanilla replacer and alongside vanilla loading screens.
State.Name: The Elder Scrolls Legends - Loading Screens

State.Author: ChildofDragons
State.Description: New loading screens from ESL, ESO, Skyrim concept art, and independent artists for 16:9 and 21:9 aspect ratios.

State.Author: andrelo1-antpillager-pyramid-crajj
State.Description: Extended implementation of Mfg Fix with new functions and animated expression transitions.
State.Name: Mfg Fix NG

State.Author: Ersh
State.Description: Physically accurate, true Havok collisions for melee. Procedural, physics-based hit reactions. Weapon trails. Hitstop and camera shake. Recoils when hitting certain materials. Supports both first person and third person, as well as other NPCs and creatures. Custom collisions for new movesets. Supports SE/AE. Includes an API for other SKSE plugins.
State.Name: Precision - Accurate Melee Collisions

State.Author: Expired
State.Description: Complete overhaul to the character creation menu including new customization features such as multiple RGBA warpaints, body paints, hand paint, and foot paints. (Requires SKSE)
State.Name: RaceMenu

State.Author: isoku-TechAngel85-CaptainCockerel
State.Description: Visually crisp and distinct water types and colors, robust improvements to water effects and meshes, improved water textures and new features. Fully compatible with ENBSeries.
State.Name: Realistic Water Two SE

State.Author: powerofthree
State.Description: Makes the game always load certain records from plugins instead of save, such as NPC weight and persistent ref position
State.Name: Save Unbaker

State.Author: Martimius
State.Description: A central hub for any compatibility patches available for Serana Dialogue Add-On. Updated for Version 4.0!
State.Name: Serana Dialogue Add-On Patch Hub

State.Author: Skyking2020
State.Description: Skyland All In One is a collection of all Skyland mods bundled together featuring high quality and resolution texture overhaul covering architecture and landscapes.
State.Name: Skyland AIO

State.Author: powerofthree-sasnikol
State.Description: SKSE plugin that can be used to add spells/perks/items/shouts/packages/outfits/keywords/factions to every NPC in the game, using config files.
State.Name: Spell Perk Item Distributor (SPID)

State.Author: Brumbek
State.Description: A massive project to greatly improve the appearance of countless static 3D models in Skyrim. Basically, this is my attempt to make the Skyrim architecture, clutter, furniture, and landscaping much nicer.
State.Name: Static Mesh Improvement Mod - SMIM

State.Author: Pfuscher and Brumbek and Rudy
State.Description: Improves many files of the great SMIM Mod, providing  visual upgrades
State.Name: Static Mesh improvement Mod - SMIM - Quality Addon

State.Author: Ersh
State.Description: Overhauls the third person gameplay similarly to modern action RPGs, entirely through SKSE. Move and attack in any direction. Includes a custom target lock component and an animated target reticle widget, target headtracking, projectile aim support during target lock, mount support and more! Modular and customizable through MCM.
State.Name: True Directional Movement - Modernized Third Person Gameplay

State.Author: Elzee
State.Description:
Why material bugs need to be fixed?

They will cause wrong footstep sounds or just silence them. 

They will also cause wrong sparks and sounds when weapons or other objects hit on them. 

Which will suddenly break immersion during playing.
State.Name: Unofficial Material Fix

State.Author: wankingSkeever
State.Description: A light-weight water mod. Includes ENB-compatible displacement maps. An optional ESP only edits water records.
State.Name: Simplicity of Sea - Water Mod with ENB Displacement Textures

State.Author: The Unofficial Patch Project Team
State.Description: A comprehensive bugfixing mod for The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim - Special Edition. The goal of the Unofficial Skyrim Special Edition Patch (aka USSEP) is to eventually fix every bug with Skyrim Special Edition not officially resolved by the developers to the limits of the Creation Kit and community-developed tools, in one easy-to-install package.
State.Name: Unofficial Skyrim Special Edition Patch - USSEP

State.Author: Kreiste and Novelyst
State.Description: A customizable body mesh replacer for male characters.
State.Name: Highly Improved Male Body Overhaul -HIMBO-

State.Description:
A preset based on Aetheos' configuration for the AEsir Rework collection, specifically from the Aetheos' Immersive Improved Camera SE-CFPAO Preset mod.



What I did was make it compatible with version 1.1.2 of Improved Camera. You are free to use this mod for your collection.



Credits to Aetheos for the configuration.
State.Name: AEsir Rework - Aetheos Immersive Improved Camera SE-CFPAO v1.1.2

State.Author: wankingSkeever
State.Description: Fixes various issues with vanilla Skyrim meshes that causes them to render incorrectly

State.Author: T4GTR43UM3R
State.Description:
Roadstones are blended to the ground mesh instead of assigning a texture to an extra mesh.

This eliminates a lot of road uvw issues.

State.Description: Blended Roads textures redone in high definition. 8, 4 & 2K versions available. The textures are also all darker than vanilla blended roads

State.Description: The most comprehensive conversion of all Vanilla (DLCs included) clothing and armor for CBBE 3BA body shape.

State.Description: Cloaks Of Skyrim Retextured From Scratch. From 4k To Vanilla Size. NO UPSCALING
State.Name: Cloaks Of Skyrim Retextured SE

State.Author: Nikinoodles and Nazenn
State.Description: Adds almost 100 new styles of cloak to the world of Skyrim, via crafting, levelled-lists, and static loot. They are lore-friendly and enchantable, and more are being added with every update. The aim of this mod is to provide some variety and flavour to the world, as well as the chance to wear a stylish cloak and quite literally keep the cold out.
State.Name: Cloaks of Skyrim

State.Description: All-In-One pack of all my doors including a handy Fomod installer and a new Dwemer door!

State.Author: Kreiste and Novelyst

Original.Name: Immersive Equipment Displays for 1.6.629 and newer-62001-1-7-4-1702213373.zip

State.Author: SlavicPotato
State.Description: Display unequipped gear and custom items on the player or NPCs. Works with any item with no additional meshes required. Doesn't use body slots. SKSE64 plugin. State.Author: T4GTR43UM3R
State.Description:
Roadstones are blended to the ground mesh instead of assigning a texture to an extra mesh.

This eliminates a lot of road uvw issues.

State.Description: High resolution RUSTIC CLOTHING texture overhaul for Skyrim Special Edition. Now with BC7 compression. Available in several resolution options.

Original.Name: Tempered Skins for Males - Dressed Version-7902-2-05-1601297180.7z

State.Author: traa108
State.Description:
High quality non-beast male face and body texture replacement coming with different options: hair, dirt, muscle smoothness.

Nude (from Better Males Remesh SE) and dressed (Vanilla based) bodies, SOS versions also available.

Also remade: complexions, snow elves, afflicted ones, vampires.
State.Name: Tempered Skins for Males - Vanilla and SOS versions

State.Author: dTry
State.Description: Script-free timed blocking, projectile parrying, stun and execution, and non-intrusive stamina management to push Skyrim's combat to modern standards.

State.Author: Dlizzio
State.Description: Utilizes HDR tonemapping from Community Shaders to the fullest extent, delivering ENB-like visuals without the performance tradeoff.

State.Description: At 110 animation files made from scratch (v1.0), I'm glad to finally bring you this 3rd person spell casting animation overhaul, works for all spell categories and for spellsword/hybrid playstyles, requires DAR.

State.Author: cupcakeninja64
State.Description: Yes, this is the official mod for Xavbio's retexture. I don't know what else you expect me to say

State.Author: lazygecko
State.Description: A dramatic and extensively customizable overhaul of Skyrim's sound.
State.Name: Immersive Sounds - Compendium

State.Author: JaySerpa
State.Description: Why is the Dragonborn the only character actively looking for marriage in the entire Skyrim? With this mod, NPCs might now be wearing an amulet of Mara, allowing you to ask them out following the Nord tradition.
State.Name: NPCs Wear Amulets of Mara PLUS

State.Author: Shutt3r
State.Description: The aim of this mod is to give all of Skyrim's architecture a complete new look by changing its textures to custom ones. Beside the architecture, several other things, such as landscape, dungeons (ruins, mines, caves etc.), clutter stuff etc. have been re-textured as well, to match the rest of the mod.  Try it out !
State.Name: Noble Skyrim Mod HD-2K

State.Author: Xing and GiraPomba
State.Description:
A modders resource/framework that allows to play an animation with movement enabled that blends with other existing animations, such as: weapons drawn/combat instance, sneaking, jumping, sitting and riding a horse.

This is supposed to be used with Nemesis and either Dynamic Animation Replacer or Open Animation Replacer.

State.Author: kreiste-wSkeever-powerofthree
State.Description: SKSE based framework for replacing overused lock model with unique lock variants.

State.Description: This is a port of the original Skyrim mod to SSE with permission from the original author.  Replaces the look of Serana and\or Valerica NPC's

State.Author: Verolevi
State.Description: Without requirements, these animations will completely replace, while holding a bow, the Idle, walk, run, turn left/right, Sprint, draw arrow, drawn arrow idle, drawn arrow walk/turn, arrow release, equip and unequip, includes belt fasted quiver animations.

This mod replaces the facial expression morphing files for humans and elves used by players and NPCs.

State.Author: CHIMgarden

State.Author: CHIMgarden

State.Author: Verolevi

State.Author: polar
State.Description: Adds thousands (yes, I checked and it is actually in the thousands) of first person animations that overwrite the janky and outdated vanilla ones. State.Author: ShoryukenBruh

State.Description: A SKSE64 plugin that adds new conditions to Open Animation Replacer for use with Immersive Equipment Displays and Simple Dual Sheath.
State.Name: Open Animation Replacer - IED Conditions

State.Author: Viny
State.Description: Stop menu/hotkeys to be triggered when enter the typing mode, so you can use caps lock, delete, home and all other keys that others mod/menus use.
State.Name: Typing Mode

State.Author: Gamwich
State.Description: RUSTIC FROSTBITE SPIDER SSE is a high resolution retexture of the neglected Frostbite Spider, which Bethesda only made 1K textures for. Hardly sufficient for the giant spiders in the game.
State.Name: RUSTIC FROSTBITE SPIDER - Special Edition

State.Author: Alek
State.Description: Special role-play overhaul of the most popular and comprehensive horse system for Skyrim.
State.Name: Convenient Horses

State.Author: alexsylex
State.Description: This SKSE plugin aims to put an end to incompatibilities between UI mods with an easy-to-use framework, allowing customization per UI element.
State.Name: Infinity UI

State.Author: epinter
State.Description: Fixes media keys (volume, play/next/mute, windows key, alt+f4, etc...) by removing game's exclusive access to the keyboard. There's an option to fix deadkeys bug, and to enable Windows key.
State.Name: Media Keys Fix SKSE

State.Author: Ersh
State.Description: A SKSE plugin that lets annotated events in paired animations work like in normal animations. Also causes the game to create synchronized animation bindings on demand, freeing up a few hundred animation slots for use by animation replacers. Supports SE/AE/VR. Open source.
State.Name: Paired Animation Improvements

State.Author: Nightfallstorm
State.Description: Detects broken papyrus scripts stuck in recursion and prevents huge framerate lag
State.Name: Recursion Monitor

Original.Name: Primitive Nord Armor Male Meshes Fix-75891-1-6-1689632953.rar

State.Author: Xavbio
State.Description: This mod retextures and fixes most of Hothtrooper44's Immersive Armors. The sets contained are split into 3 categories: Retextures, Mesh replacers and Mesh fixes. CBBE and HIMBO patches linked in the comments
State.Name: Immersive Armors Retexture and Mesh Fixes SE

State.Author: Jkrojmal
State.Description: An enhanced Inn overhaul.
State.Name: JK's Silver-Blood Inn

State.Author: Jkrojmal
State.Description: A lore friendly shop overhaul of Warmaiden's.
State.Name: JK's Warmaiden's

State.Author: doodlez and Mathieu C
State.Description: Community Shaders feature which adds screen-space shadows, enabling grass, map, distant and self-shadows.
State.Name: Screen-Space Shadows

Original.Name: XPMSSE Left Hand Skeleton Rotation Fix-50049-4-80-1621290459.zip

State.Author: SlavicPotato
State.Description: Makes equipped left hand weapons and both staves visible on the player or NPCs. Works with any weapon. Lightweight SKSE64 plugin. No scripts, ESPs or additional meshes required. Includes shield on back option.
State.Name: Simple Dual Sheath

State.Author: Bottle
State.Description: MO2 Tool to check and update meta data for a users installed mods that fixes version number warnings from Authors that do not update the latest version number correctly on nexus.
State.Name: Mod Version Fixer for Mo2 (Mod Organizer 2)

State.Author: Symonson
State.Description: Falkreath is a small, quiet hold town and so there were just some little details added, to keep it in line with the other town overhauls.
State.Name: Capital of Falkreath

State.Author: center05
State.Description: Improves Skyrim's combat by removing the aimbot-like attacks of creatures, and imposing movement limits on NPCs while they are attacking.
State.Name: Mortal Enemies SE

State.Author: cloudedtruth
State.Description: Adds over 5,000 lines of completely voiced dialogue for NPCs using the original voices. Friends, followers, spouses, rivals, and others have much more to say. All default voices now have follower dialogue. Also fixes dialogue bugs and restores cut dialogue that has never been heard before!
State.Name: Relationship Dialogue Overhaul - RDO SE

State.Author: Nightfallstorm
State.Description: Collection of fixes, tweaks and performance improvements for Skyrim's script engine. 100% configurable. Install/Uninstall anytime.
State.Name: Papyrus Tweaks NG

State.Author: Kinaga
State.Description: A lightweight overhaul of both the vanilla Skyrim carriage system and Dawnguard's ferry system. Realistic and bug-free.
State.Name: Carriage and Ferry Travel Overhaul (Formerly Complete Fast Travel Overhaul)

State.Author: Jampion
State.Description: Removes tint, contrast and saturation altering effects that are applied to loading screens, so that loading screens appear in their original colors. Most noticeable when using image based loading screens.
State.Name: Improved Loading Screen Colors

State.Author: Jkrojmal and Teabag86
State.Description: An enhanced Skyrim cities and towns overhaul all in one.
State.Name: JK's Skyrim

State.Author: Jkrojmal
State.Description: An enhanced shop overhaul.
State.Name: JK's White Phial

State.Author: Loki
State.Description: SKSE Plugin to make water slow actors (NPCs and yourself) down depending on how much of them is submerged.
State.Name: Loki's Wade In Water

State.Author: CS Team
State.Description: Advanced Community Shaders feature which simulates large scale world-space ambient occlusion. Supports SE, AE, and VR.
State.Name: Skylighting

State.Author: Skyking2020
State.Description: Get ready for a whole new experience with Skyland - Whiterun. A complete texture overhaul of Whiterun utilizing real world 3D scanned textures for the greatest visuals.
State.Name: Skyland Whiterun

State.Author: Symonson
State.Description: This Mod changes Morthal to make it look and feel like a hold capital (a small one at least) and not some lost village in the swamps.
State.Name: Capital of Hjaalmarch

State.Author: Ashingda
State.Description: Remove camera sway, head bobbing and FOV zoom. For 1st and 3rd person. All animation left intact. Made for those who get motion sickness.
State.Name: Motion Sensitive Fix SE

State.Author: Parapets
State.Description: Overhauls the Plugins panel in Mod Organizer with new functionality and tweaked visuals.
State.Name: Bethesda Plugin Manager for Mod Organizer

State.Author: Maxsu doodlez
State.Description: Community Shaders feature which adds player collision to grass shaders with minimal performance impact.
State.Name: Grass Collision

State.Author: agd25
State.Description: This mod is an overhaul of all of Skyrim's vanilla questlines DLC's, designed provide the player breaks at each stage, enhance roleplaying opportunities, and slow the game down so you can play it at your own pace.
State.Name: At Your Own Pace

Original.Name: CFTO - Immersive Citizens AI Overhaul Patch-8379-2-0-1542535682.7z

State.Author: Kinaga
State.Description: A lightweight overhaul of both the vanilla Skyrim carriage system and Dawnguard's ferry system. Realistic and bug-free.
State.Name: Carriage and Ferry Travel Overhaul (Formerly Complete Fast Travel Overhaul)

State.Author: Arnaud dOrchymont
State.Description: Immersive Citizens - AI Overhaul is a mod whose purpose is to increase player in-game immersion by greatly improving Artificial Intelligence (AI) of friendly NPCs (citizens) in order to make them act and react like true humans in relation to their environment or to an aggressor.
State.Name: Immersive Citizens  - AI Overhaul SE

State.Author: JKrojmal
State.Description: An enhanced city overhaul.
State.Name: JK's Whiterun

State.Author: Fuzzles
State.Description: Small tweak to add locks to the Soul Cairn chests, as vanilla does not have any.
State.Name: Soul-Cairn Objects Secured

Original.Name: TrueHud Numbers for PlayerWidget and BossHealthBar-134224-V1-1-1733681027.rar

State.Author: W1ldT1ger
State.Description: Displays Stamina, Magicka and Health Numbers for the Player in the Player Widget and Enemy Health in Bossbar.
State.Name: TrueHud Numbers for PlayerWidget and BossHealthBar

State.Author: BingusEx
State.Description: A simple CommonlibSSE-NG plugin that tries to fix stuck key inputs when alt-tabbing in and out of the game.
State.Name: Alt-Tab Stuck Key Fix NG

State.Author: AFT Created by Dheuster and converted to SSE by Allie and AFKRoger
State.Description: Multiple followers. Manage outfits, spells, combat style, home assignment and level up. Make werewolves or vampires lords. Followers ride horses, make camp, avoid traps, ignore friendly fire, toggle city/standard outfits & helmets, pose, dance and more
State.Name: Amazing Follower Tweaks SE

State.Author: Symonson
State.Description: This Mod changes Morthal to make it look and feel like a hold capital (a small one at least) and not some lost village in the swamps.
State.Name: Capital of Hjaalmarch

State.Author: Superfuzz
State.Description: Restores a number of unused sound effects.
State.Name: Unused Sounds Restored

State.Author: GonDragon
State.Description: Small UI change for SkyUI that let it show the Warmth Value of the items. It will only show it if Survival Mode is enabled.
State.Name: SkyUI - Survival Mode Integration

State.Author: Kape001
State.Description: This patch remove some of the gears that, to me, are too powerful upon early game.
State.Name: Alternate Perspective - More Sensible Starting Gear Patch
